title: German Peppery Hash Brown Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole made with crispy hash browns, savory German sausage, and a hint of peppery flavor.
instructions: Cut the German sausages into 1-inch pieces and cook in a skillet over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the hash browns to the skillet and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the skillet mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Dot the top of the casserole with butter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and the hash browns are crispy.
